pr-evidence/strict-v1-engine-probe-compl.gpt55_review_summary: Aquinas the 3rd approved/clean with no bugs, regressions, compatibility issues, or validation gaps; noted the PR evidence directory should be intentionally included before commit.
scope: release bundle strict V1 completeness gate, document and legacy CLI help, README release instructions, and release-bundle tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Made strict V1 release bundles explicitly require both vLLM and SGLang native engine-probe sidecars before release publishing.
pr-evidence/strict-v1-engine-probe-compl.why: The V1 release bundle requirement names native engine probes as required artifacts; strict mode should fail early and clearly when either probe sidecar is missing instead of relying on later release-evidence inference.
